title: ASR Outdoor 13" Inch Steel Gold Panning Trowel Digger Pay Dirt
description:
Easily break through compacted gravel, hard soil and stubborn roots with the ASR Outdoor Serrated Edge Digger. This versatile 13 inch hand trowel is constructed of heavy duty heat treated carbon steel that will allow you to shovel through the tough materials. It features a serrated edge that is designed for easily cutting through top layers of brush and soil while on the hunt for lost possessions or at home gardening so you can plant new seeds with ease. The blade itself is 7.5 inches in length, so you can count on it to dig deep into whatever earth you're working with. The garden digger features a high visibility bright orange handle with an ergonomic grip to prevent slippage during use, and it even comes with a nylon sheath to protect the serrated edges when not in use

ASR Outdoor 13" Inch Steel Gold Panning Trowel Digger Pay Dirt

Easily break through compacted gravel, hard soil and stubborn roots with the ASR Outdoor Serrated Edge Digger.

Key Features

  • VERSATILE DIGGING TOOL: Easily break through hard soil and stubborn roots, ideal for metal detector hobbyist and home gardening DIY projects; this is the right tool to have when a plastic hand trowel wont break through the earth
  • FIELD TESTED: After many seasons on the hunt for treasure finds we have seen the benefit of the heated carbon steel this hand digging tool is made from; weatherproof and rust proof this is a hand tool that can stand up to hard use rain or shine. No need to avoid rocks when you can dig right past them
  • DOUBLE EDGE SERRATED BLADE: 7.5 inch carbon steel blade is designed to penetrate hard soil and overburden with ease; use the double edge to saw into the ground in either direction to pull out clean clumps of earth to expose your find or simply plant some seeds like Johnny Appleseed
  • NON SLIP ERGONOMIC HAND: Often overlooked, our handle is oversized with a criss cross pattern to prevent slippage and allow a firm grasp; it feels good in the hand
  • DETAILED SPECIFICATIONS: Handle Length: 5 inches; Blade Length: 7.5 inches; Overall Length:13 inches; Includes black nylon sheath with built in belt loop for storage

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROCSGPTGRN
  • UPC: 060886306337
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 13 in

This versatile 13 inch hand trowel is constructed of heavy duty heat treated carbon steel that will allow you to shovel through the tough materials. It features a serrated edge that is designed for easily cutting through top layers of brush and soil while on the hunt for lost possessions or at home gardening so you can plant new seeds with ease. The blade itself is 7.5 inches in length, so you can count on it to dig deep into whatever earth you're working with.

The garden digger features a high visibility bright orange handle with an ergonomic grip to prevent slippage during use, and it even comes with a nylon sheath to protect the serrated edges when not in use. The sheath also features a belt loop so you can attach it to your belt while you're working. This is a great multipurpose digging tool for gardeners and metal detector hobbyist a like.
